generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - another terror plot foiled by domestic security agencies. But here's the kicker: they had to work around outdated laws that tie their hands. We can't keep letting bureaucrats and activists put our safety at risk. If we don't give our security services the tools they need, who's going to protect us when the next attack comes? #NationalSecurityFirst #SupportOurAgents
